characters.name: Auggie
characters.description: AuggieSpeciesDogGenderFemaleFamilySam(Owner),Mo(Brother)Debut"The New Crew"Voice actorSpencer MossAuggieis a young puppy inPuppy Dog Palsand is Mo's sister. Auggie's blue-gray coat covers most of the body and is complemented with white parts covering the lower part of the nosebridge in an upside V-shape down to the whole face below the cheek level and stretching down to the chest and underbelly to the rump, the tip of the tail, and the entirety of the four paws up to the hocks. Gray freckles are also present on her nosebridge. The nose is gray in color while the eyes each contain a white sclera and a blue turquoise lens. The eyebrows are black. She has pawpads that are white and camouflaged into her white paws. Her ears are folded and the tail is of medium length and straight. Auggie always appears with a teal collar with a golden tag.

characters.name: Auggie

Gray freckles are also present on her nosebridge. The nose is gray in color while the eyes each contain a white sclera and a blue turquoise lens. The eyebrows are black. characters.name: Beatrice
characters.description: BeatriceSpeciesHumanGenderFemaleFamilyCupcake,Rufus(Pets)Debut"Bob's Birthday Wish"Voice actorAlanna UbachBeatriceis a human character inPuppy Dog Pals. She is the owner ofCupcakeandRufus. She appears frequently as a background character inseason 1, but her relationship with Cupcake and Rufus was not revealed until "The Fang Fairy". She remains unnamed until "Fantastic Pet Force".
